program_name_en: Master of Science in Finance
faculty: Waseda Business School (Graduate School of Business and Finance)
tuition: Total approx. JPY 4,176,000 over 2 years / 4 semesters: 1st semester JPY 1,184,000 (incl. JPY 300,000 entrance fee), 2nd JPY 884,000, 3rd JPY 1,034,000, 4th JPY 1,074,000 (incl. JPY 40,000 alumni fee); entrance fee waived for current/former Waseda students

requirements.undergrad_background: No specific major restriction stated; applicant must meet one of several eligibility routes (Bachelor's from accredited Japanese university, 16 years of schooling outside Japan, 3+ year non-Japan university program, etc.)
requirements.gmat_gre: GMAT or GRE score submission is mandatory for standard applicants
requirements.prerequisites: Curriculum assumes quantitative aptitude (Mathematics for Finance, Statistics, Econometrics in compulsory core) but no strict undergraduate major requirement stated

deadlines.notes: 9月(秋季)入学项目,以上为官网列出的2026年9月入学三轮申请;对应入学确认(enrollment)截止日分别为2026-01-09 / 2026-03-23 / 2026-05-29。

notes: 全英语授课,官网未提及日语要求;GMAT/GRE为必需。官网近期通知已要求提交英语成绩,但具体单项分数门槛未在抓取页面中列出,故ielts/toefl留空。约每年招收20名学生,无国籍配额限制。同校WBS的International MBA(IMBA)为MBA性质,按规则未收录。

program_name_en: Master's Program, International Program in Economics (UTIPE)

requirements.prerequisites: Core courses: Macroeconomics, Microeconomics, Econometrics; broader Graduate School of Economics also covers Management, Accounting, Finance and Quantitative Finance
requirements.local_language_requirement: Not required to obtain the degree (program explicitly does not require Japanese ability)

deadlines.notes: 官网确认学生可选择4月或10月入学,每年约录取15人;官网具体申请页面(gaia.e.u-tokyo.ac.jp/utipe/admission/master/)多次抓取失败(连接中断),截止日期、学费、材料清单未能核实。

notes: 该项目为东大经济学研究科下设的全英语硕士项目,不要求日语能力。因官网详情页多次抓取失败,大量字段（学费、截止日期、材料清单、英语门槛）依据搜索引擎摘要判断，未能逐一核实原文，建议后续直接访问官网确认。

program_name_en: Master's Program in Economics (English-based track)
program_name_zh: 经济学研究科硕士课程（英语授课通道）

requirements.interview: 1st round: written economics exam + interview; 2nd round: submitted paper review + interview (no written exam)
requirements.teaching_language: English (official page states students can complete all degree requirements in English)
requirements.local_language_requirement: Not explicitly required; exams may be taken in English only. Keio Economics Faculty graduates meeting certain criteria are exempt from written exam / language proficiency submission.

rounds.name: 1st round exam (~July), enrollment choice of Sept or following April
2nd round exam (~Feb/March), enrollment choice of April or September same year

deadlines.notes: 官网(econ.keio.ac.jp / keio.ac.jp/en/gsecon)确认每年两轮考试，可选4月或9月入学；具体2026-2027轮次的报名截止日期未能从抓取内容中获取，需查阅Application Guidebook（PDF未能完整解析）。

notes: 庆应经济学研究科明确可全英语完成硕士学位。庆应商学院（KBS）主力项目为日语MBA，未收录；庆应「Graduate School of Business and Commerce」下英语授课项目仅有Taxation Policy and Management（税收政策方向，非典型商科硕士），因方向不匹配未单独收录。学费、材料清单、具体截止日期等字段因官网信息不全而留空。

program_name_en: MS in International Business (Department of International Business, KUBS)

requirements.prerequisites: International Business area covers international business management, international marketing, international finance, trade and commerce
requirements.teaching_language: English (official department page states all International Business courses are taught in English)

deadlines.notes: 具体2026/2027申请轮次与截止日期未在抓取页面中找到，需查阅 https://graduate2.korea.ac.kr/admission/schedule.html 获取当季日期。

notes: 官网明确国际经营学专业课程全部使用英语授课。KUBS MS/PhD一般要求提交TOEFL/TEPS/IELTS/TOEIC等语言成绩之一（毕业于英语国家大学者可豁免），但未列出具体分数门槛；学费、材料清单不全，建议以KUBS官网当季简章为准。

program_name_en: MS Program in Business Administration (Finance / Accounting / Management / Marketing / Strategy / IS / LSOM majors)
program_name_zh: 经营学硕士（金融/会计/管理/市场营销等方向）

requirements.teaching_language: Not explicitly confirmed as fully English on official page (unlike the International Business track); presumed mixed Korean/English

deadlines.notes: 官网注明Business Management/Marketing/Finance/Accounting专业「only be selected for the Spring semester」，即仅春季入学；具体截止日期未列出。

notes: 该项目授课语言未在官网明确标注为全英文授课（与国际经营学方向不同），建议申请前直接向KUBS核实每门课程英语授课覆盖情况；金融/会计/管理/市场营销专业仅春季学期招生。需提交语言成绩（TOEFL/TEPS/IELTS/TOEIC），毕业于英语国家大学者可豁免。

program_name_en: MA in International Studies - International Commerce Track, GSIS
program_name_zh: 国际学大学院—国际通商方向硕士

requirements.prerequisites: Track covers trade, finance, business and marketing within globalization; sample courses: Macroeconomics, Strategic Management, Electronic Commerce, Foreign Direct Investment, Money and Banking
requirements.teaching_language: English (KU GSIS courses taught entirely in English per official page)

deadlines.notes: 官网未列出2026/2027具体申请截止日期；需在 Thesis Track（39学分）与 Non-Thesis Track（42学分）间选择。

notes: 学位授予为「Master of Arts in International Studies」并注明国际通商方向；学费、英语门槛分数、截止日期未能在抓取内容中找到。

program_name_en: Master of Global Economy and Strategy (MGES)

requirements.teaching_language: English (all three GSIS master's tracks - MKS/MGAP/MGES - taught entirely in English)

deadlines.notes: 秋季（9月）入学；网申窗口2026-03-23至2026-04-13，录取结果2026-06-12 18:00(KST)前公布，学费缴纳在2026年7-8月。也可接受TOEIC 750 / TEPS 600 替代雅思托福。

notes: MGES方向聚焦全球经济与商业战略，与经济学/国际商务高度相关，全英语授课，是本次调研中信息最完整的韩国项目之一。学位要求48学分，或42学分+硕士论文（论文轨要求前两学期GPA≥3.7）。Yonsei商学院（YSB）常规MS/PhD项目「多数课程以韩语授课」，不符合纯英语授课要求，故未收录；Yonsei Global MBA为MBA性质，按规则未收录。

program_name_en: Graduate Master's Program (MS), College of Business Administration - English-taught track
program_name_zh: 经营学部研究生硕士课程（英语授课通道）

requirements.teaching_language: Two tracks: English track (TOEFL iBT 80+ / IELTS 6.0+ / TEPS 269+) or Korean track (requires TOPIK Level 6)
requirements.local_language_requirement: Only required (TOPIK Level 6) if choosing the Korean-taught track; not required for the English track

deadlines.notes: 未能确认具体截止日期；官网说明仅适用于2021年7月1日后的语言成绩，且不接受TOEFL ITP。

notes: 未能在SNU经营学院官网（cba.snu.ac.kr）确认是否存在与Global MBA分开、专门面向国际学生的独立授课型硕士(taught master's)项目名称——该学院的常规硕士偏研究型(MS，衔接博士)，是否可全程用英语完成学位仍存疑，本条目按官网整体语言要求政策记录，置信度降为low，建议直接联系cba.snu.ac.kr核实。Global MBA因属MBA性质未收录（其语言要求为TOEFL 86/IELTS 6.5，供参考不代表本条目）。

program_name_en: Master's Program, GSIS - International Commerce Track
program_name_zh: 国际大学院—国际通商方向硕士

requirements.prerequisites: International Commerce division covers international trade & finance, international business & investment, international trade law & negotiations
requirements.teaching_language: Mainly English, with some selective classes in Korean/Japanese/Chinese depending on major

deadlines.notes: 具体学费、截止日期、英语门槛分数未能在抓取内容中找到，需查阅 https://gsis.snu.ac.kr/masters-program/ 。

notes: SNU国际大学院下设五大方向之一为国际通商(International Commerce)，课程以英语为主。

program_name_en: MS in Business and Technology Management (BTM)
program_name_zh: 经营与技术管理学硕士
faculty: School of Business and Technology Management, KAIST College of Business
campus: Seoul / Daejeon (BTM listed under Daejeon Campus in program directory)

requirements.teaching_language: Reported as English-taught for international students, but this characterization is drawn from a third-party aggregator rather than a directly confirmed KAIST official-site statement

deadlines.notes: 官网项目页(business.kaist.edu/programs/0206)与btm.kaist.ac.kr均未能抓取到完整招生信息（后者404）。

notes: KAIST经营学院的Finance MBA为MBA性质未收录；Master of Financial Engineering（MFE）官网明确标注为韩语授课（Offered in Korean），因授课语言不符未收录。BTM项目是否严格意义上全英语授课未能从KAIST官网原文直接核实，置信度降为low，建议直接联系KAIST College of Business确认。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Finance
tuition: MOP 204,000 total for non-local (non-Macau-resident) students; MOP 97,800 for local students (Macao SAR resident ID holders) — AY2024/2025 rate

requirements.undergrad_background: Open to bachelor's degree holders in any discipline; preferred backgrounds: finance, economics, applied mathematics, statistics, computer science, engineering, or other quantitative fields
requirements.gmat_gre: GRE or GMAT results preferable but not mandatory
requirements.prerequisites: Program established 2009, quantitative-skills focused, includes FinTech-related coursework, faculty includes CFA charterholders

deadlines.notes: 官网(mscfin.fba.um.edu.mo)未列出2026/2027申请截止日期；具体轮次需查阅 https://grs.um.edu.mo/index.php/prospective-students/master-postgraduate-certificate-diploma-programmes/ 及内地学生专用入学章程（PDF未能解析文字内容）。

notes: 澳大MBA/EMBA为MBA性质未收录。英语单项分数线官网未列明。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Accounting
tuition: MOP 204,000 total for non-local students; MOP 97,800 for local students (Macao SAR resident ID holders) — AY2025/2026 rate

requirements.gpa_requirement: Minimum cumulative GPA of 2.7 required for graduation (admission-specific GPA threshold not separately stated)
requirements.prerequisites: 36 credits total: 6 compulsory courses + 4 required elective courses + project report with oral defense

deadlines.notes: 官网未列出2026/2027具体申请截止日期。

notes: 英语能力证明可用：本科就读院校出具的英语授课证明，或TOEFL/IELTS/CET6成绩（均未列明具体分数线）。上课时间「主要在工作日晚间及周末」，需留意是否适合脱产留学生。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Business Analytics
tuition: MOP 204,000 total for non-local students; MOP 97,800 for local students (Macao SAR resident ID holders) — AY2025/2026 rate
campus: University of Macau main campus and University of Macau Science and Education Base, Hengqin (class location per student's stated preference)

requirements.undergrad_background: One of: (1) bachelor's in business, (2) bachelor's in computer science/information systems/STEM field, or (3) two years of business work experience
requirements.gpa_requirement: Cumulative GPA of 2.7 or above required for graduation
requirements.work_experience: At least two years of working experience in business firms required for applicants without a business or STEM undergraduate background

deadlines.notes: 官网未列出2026/2027具体申请截止日期。

notes: 英语能力证明可用：本科英语授课证明，或TOEFL/IELTS/CET6成绩（均未列明具体分数线）。部分课程可能安排在横琴校区上课。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Data Science - Financial Technology Specialization
program_name_zh: 数据科学理学硕士（金融科技方向）
faculty: Institute of Collaborative Innovation (ICI), Centre for Data Science

requirements.prerequisites: Specialization courses include Topics in Data Analytics and Financial Technology, Introduction to Modern Financial Technology, plus a project report and two finance electives

deadlines.notes: 该专业方向页面仅列出课程结构，未列明学制、学费、截止日期、英语要求。

notes: 授课语言未在该页面明确注明（澳大多数硕士项目为英语授课，但本条目未能直接核实），故teaching_language留空且置信度降为low；建议查阅 https://cds.ici.um.edu.mo/ 主项目页获取完整信息。

program_name_en: Master of Science in Data Science - Marketing Analytics Specialization
program_name_zh: 数据科学理学硕士（市场分析方向）
faculty: Institute of Collaborative Innovation (ICI), Centre for Data Science

requirements.prerequisites: Specialization courses include Marketing Management, Consumer Behavior, Marketing Analytics, Research Methods, plus fundamental data science courses (Data Science Programming, Data Visualization, Database and Data Analysis, Practical Machine Learning) and a 6-credit project report

deadlines.notes: 该专业方向页面仅列出课程结构，未列明学制、学费、截止日期、英语要求。

notes: 授课语言未在该页面明确注明，置信度降为low；建议查阅 https://cds.ici.um.edu.mo/ 主项目页获取完整信息。

school_name_en: Macau University of Science and Technology
program_name_en: Master of Science in Finance

requirements.prerequisites: Program combines financial theory and financial analysis training; covers financial data analysis using statistics/econometrics software (EViews, STATA, Python, R); supports preparation for certificates such as China Securities Qualification or CFA; school has a dedicated finance lab with professional financial databases. Curriculum: 6 core courses (18 credits) + electives.

deadlines.notes: 官网课程说明页(msb.must.edu.mo)未列明学费、学制、申请截止日期；一般性招生页(must.edu.mo/en/sgs、pgadmissions.must.edu.mo)抓取时均返回403/重定向失败。

notes: 授课语言未在抓取页面明确注明为英语（澳科大官网面试报道提到商学院部分课程需要英语能力证明，四级≥450/六级≥430/雅思≥6.0/托福≥80，但该信息来自第三方转述而非官网原文，未直接引用为本条目分数）。因关键字段大量缺失，置信度定为low，强烈建议直接联系 msb_inquiry@must.edu.mo 核实。

school_name_en: Macau University of Science and Technology
program_name_en: Master of Science in Accounting

requirements.prerequisites: Covers financial accounting (US GAAP and IFRS), auditing, and taxation; 36 credits (24 core + 12 elective) plus an accounting paper
requirements.teaching_language: Program description states courses are taught in English along with Chinese, Portuguese and Spanish depending on course (per topuniversities.com aggregator, not directly confirmed on must.edu.mo)

deadlines.notes: 官网页面(must.edu.mo/en/msb/...master-science-accounting)抓取被拒绝(403)，本条目部分信息来自第三方聚合站点，未能直接核实原文。

notes: 授课语言未能通过官网原文直接确认，来源为第三方转述，置信度降为low；建议直接联系 msb_inquiry@must.edu.mo 或访问 msb.must.edu.mo 核实是否有独立英语授课班。
